params.name: Constantine Statue
params.description:
On July 21, 301 AD, this statue of Emperor Constantine the Great was completed.
Emperor Constantine the Great was a very important ruler of the Roman Empire. He re-unified the Roman Empire and implemented a series of reforms. He was also the first Roman ruler to convert to Christianity and is honored as Emperor Constantine the Great. This lifelike statue shows extraordinary majesty of this imperial monarch. It is currently housed in a museum in Rome.
